theme: Light Mode Exclusive - Premium FinTech / Apple Glass Aesthetic

surfaces.glass: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75); backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(150%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
surfaces.card: background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); box-shadow: var(--v2-shadow-sm);

home_greeting.layout: Flex container, user avatar on right, greeting left
home_greeting.date: Clickable badge style (data-testid: home-date), light gray bg, pill shape, bold text

daily_advice.state_closed: Glassmorphism button, spark icon with gradient, 'Conseil du jour' text, chevron-down icon
daily_advice.state_open: Expands via max-height transition. Content fades in. Reveals AI advice with 'Continuer la conversation' and 'Marquer fait' actions.

ai_chat_cta.placement: Center of Home page just below Greeting/Advice
ai_chat_cta.design: Large premium input-like bar. Placeholder 'Demander à KOLO, une estimation...'. Gradient border or subtle drop shadow with a prominent gradient spark icon.
ai_chat_cta.interaction: Tapping morphs it into a full-screen Chat Modal (sheet sliding from bottom)

mic_fab.placement: Center of Bottom Nav (Home only), floating
mic_fab.design: 64px circular button, solid black background, white mic icon. Subtle pulsing halo behind it using box-shadow.
mic_fab.label: MUST include 'Créer une note' outside the circle, below it.
mic_fab.interaction: On tap, morphs into a red recording state with audio waveform animation.

bottom_nav.design: Glassmorphism container (--v2-glass-bg) with backdrop-filter. Sticky at bottom.
bottom_nav.interaction: Active tab gets a gradient icon and an animated sliding pill/indicator.

drawer_sidebar.design: Premium white slide-out panel, soft-lg shadow.

quota_block.design: Card with subtle border. Progress bars use brand gradient (violet to pink) and pulse slightly when >80%.

go_pro_btn.design: Solid black with gradient border, premium text.

cards.design: border-radius: 16px, background: white, 1px subtle border, soft shadow on hover/active. Inner spacing 16px or 20px.

micro_animations.list_stagger: List items (folders, contacts) enter with translateY(10px) and opacity-0, staggered by 60ms.
micro_animations.ai_loading: 3 dots bouncing, each colored with a step of the violet->pink gradient.
micro_animations.page_transition: Fade + subtle scale (0.98 to 1.0) to ensure 60fps on Capacitor (transform/opacity only).

app_store_readiness.icons: Provide 192/512/180/1024 icons. Logo is 'KOLO' with the 'O' using the violet->pink gradient on a clean white background.
app_store_readiness.splash_screen: Minimalist white background, central KOLO logo, tiny loading indicator at the bottom.
app_store_readiness.hero_shot: Device angled, showing the glassmorphism bottom nav and the expanded Daily Advice.

phase_1.name: Tokens & Foundation
tasks: Setup gradient utilities and glassmorphism classes in raw CSS
Verify base typography (SF Pro/Inter) and font weights

phase_2.name: Core Components & Layout
tasks: Implement glass bottom nav with animated indicator
Place AI Chat CTA and Mic FAB with multilingual label on Home

phase_3.name: Interactions & Micro-polish
tasks: Build collapsible fluid animation for Daily Advice
Implement morphing state for Mic recording

critical_rules.data_testids: DO NOT REMOVE OR CHANGE ANY existing data-testid. See problem statement for full list. (e.g. v2-burger, v2-drawer)
critical_rules.mobile_perf: Use ONLY opacity and transform for transitions to maintain 60fps on Capacitor wrappers. Use vanilla CSS if Tailwind is not configured.
critical_rules.toasts: Use Sonner for toasts as specified.
